message:
fix(spawn): prevent duplicate agent reconciliation and revert goreleaser escaping

Two issues found during code review:

1. Reconciliation could match the same server-side agent for multiple
   panes when spawning several agents with identical program/model.
   Added reconciledIDs set to track already-claimed agent IDs.

2. Reverted \" escaping in .goreleaser.yaml — GoReleaser v2 generates
   <<~EOS heredocs for caveats (goreleaser#6460), so escaping produces
   literal backslashes. The Casks/ntm.rb hotfix with \" remains correct
   since it uses double-quoted Ruby strings; it will be regenerated on
   the next release.

Refs: #97, #98

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -189,10 +189,10 @@ homebrew_casks:
       To complete installation, add the following to your shell config:
 
         # For zsh (add to ~/.zshrc):
-        eval \"$(ntm init zsh)\"
+        eval "$(ntm init zsh)"
 
         # For bash (add to ~/.bashrc):
-        eval \"$(ntm init bash)\"
+        eval "$(ntm init bash)"
 
       Run 'ntm tutorial' to get started!
